summary: No additional deterministic setup is needed: maven-scm-provider-gitexe is a Git CLI-backed Maven SCM provider whose runtime dependencies resolve transitively, and meaningful coverage is reachable through command-line factory and output-consumer APIs without optional Maven dependencies or Docker services.
risks: If the generated test chooses to execute real SCM operations instead of only constructing commands or testing consumers, it must use an isolated temporary local Git repository and avoid network remotes; this is test logic, not repository setup.
The reported failure appears to be version-sensitive command-line executable quoting rather than a missing dependency or service.

input_evidence.name: issue
